item.title: A first clue changes this missing person case

item.title: She took $30 million, then disappeared
item.description: A true crime case centered on a $30 million theft and a disappearance that left investigators and viewers focused on what came next.

item.title: A clip that changes the case
item.description: A small clip changes the meaning of the case and raises new questions about what happened before he vanished.
